---
title: "Exercise 2. Markdown basics"
---
# My Markdown page
what happens if I write here, ooooh look it adds to site/page details saved in codespace, unless you commit and sync changes
***

## Section 1
The final word of this sentence will be **bold**.
*This whole sentence will be in italics.*

### Details
* Bullet point 1
* Bullet point 2
* Bullet point 3
* Bullet point 1
    * Bullet point level 2
        * Bullet point level 3
* Back to level 1
1. Numbered point 1
    a. Numbered point level 2 
    b. Numbered point level 2 again
2. Back to level 1

Checklist

* [ ] First task
* [x] Finished task

#### and last sub-heading
> Quarto helps me keep my work organised.

##### will I need more space for playing with quarto

[University of Exeter](https://www.exeter.ac.uk/)

<https://www.exeter.ac.uk/>

Run `python script.py` in your terminal.

Open `analysis.qmd` and edit the first section.

```bash
python script.py --help
echo "Hello, world"
```

| Letter | Number |extra|
| - | - |-|
| A | 1 |4|
| B | 2 |5|
| C | 3 |6|
